$comment: EXEMPLE pédagogique · learnings.json Stepprs · 8 patterns captured via skill trendtrack-enrich-brand v1.0.0 (TrendTrack API live 2026-05-16) · vitrine canon learnings.schema v1.1 + cross-refs canonical PNT/OBJ/ANG/mechanisms/benefits

example_canon_showcased: learnings.json canon v1.1 · 8 patterns observed cross-skills
trendtrack-enrich-brand v1.0.0 output · 8 patterns Step 4 patterns analysis

learnings.formulation: Stepprs scaling strategy = 1 hero narrative replicated cross-geo · pas diversifié angles. Top 7 ads spend $146,651 + reach 16M+ via single Michelle testimonial dupliqué DE GB GB GB RO ES IT.
learnings.source: trendtrack-enrich-brand v1.0.0 · Step 4 Pattern 1 narrative diversity ratio

learnings.formulation: Audience cross-narrative validated · Michelle testimonial combine plantar fasciitis (chronic-pain-45) + 10-hour shifts work boots (workers-shifts) en single ad copy · audiences théoriquement séparées canon mais combinées paid practice.
learnings.source: trendtrack-enrich-brand v1.0.0 · Step 3 ads body analysis

learnings.formulation: CTA dominant Stepprs · 'Walk on Clouds Or It's FREE' capture 2 benefits en single phrase · Walking on Air emotional + 90-day money back guarantee risk-free. Variant CTA 'SAVE UP TO 60% TODAY' price-driven secondaire.
learnings.source: trendtrack-enrich-brand v1.0.0 · Step 4 Pattern 5 CTA patterns

learnings.formulation: Geo focus paid social Stepprs · EU heavy (DE main · GB IT ES RO Top 5 countries) · pas US prioritaire malgré target_geo annoncé US/UK/EU. Pattern scale via geo duplication single hero ad.
learnings.source: trendtrack-enrich-brand v1.0.0 · Step 4 Pattern 2 geo distribution

learnings.formulation: Targeting demographic broad · 18+ age · gender null (no filter) · pain-based filtering naturel via copy verbatim (plantar fasciitis · 10-hour shifts · work boots). Pas narrow age 45+ comme audience chronic-pain-45 canon suggérerait.
learnings.source: trendtrack-enrich-brand v1.0.0 · Step 4 Pattern 7 targeting demographic

learnings.formulation: Creative format split image + video balanced (50/50 sur 30 ads sampled) · pas dominance claire. Production split equilibré · test both formats systematically.
learnings.source: trendtrack-enrich-brand v1.0.0 · Step 4 Pattern 4 creative format split

learnings.formulation: Landing pages diversity · 4 variants test funnels rotation · /pages/review-3-1 · /pages/review-3-3 · /pages/review-3-5 · /products/massage. Pattern A/B test pages review-themed advertorial funnel.
learnings.source: trendtrack-enrich-brand v1.0.0 · Step 4 Pattern 6 landing pages diversity

learnings.formulation: Trustpilot 3.4/5 sur 2127 reviews · réalité plus mitigée que claim site 4.8/5. Validates objection scepticism #1 (OBJ-02 · OBJ-07) fondée · audiences chronic-pain-45 méfiance multi-insoles failed pertinente.
learnings.source: trendtrack-enrich-brand v1.0.0 · Step 2 shop profile trustpilot data
